all.en: Last Saturday, I signed up for a cooking class to learn how to make homemade pasta from scratch.
all.zh: 上週六，我報名了一堂烹飪課，學習如何從頭製作自製義大利麵。

all.en: The instructor was an Italian chef who had over twenty years of experience in famous restaurants.
all.zh: 老師是一位義大利主廚，在知名餐廳擁有超過二十年的經驗。

all.en: He showed us how to mix flour, eggs, and a pinch of salt to form a smooth dough.
all.zh: 他示範如何將麵粉、雞蛋與一小撮鹽混合，揉成光滑的麵團。

all.en: At first, my dough was too sticky, so I had to add more flour and knead it longer.
all.zh: 一開始，我的麵團太黏，所以必須加入更多麵粉並揉得更久。

all.en: We let the dough rest for thirty minutes while we prepared a fresh tomato sauce.
all.zh: 我們讓麵團靜置三十分鐘，同時準備新鮮的番茄醬汁。

all.en: Rolling out the pasta with a wooden pin required patience and a lot of arm strength.
all.zh: 用木製擀麵棍把麵團擀開需要耐心與大量臂力。

all.en: The chef taught us how to cut the dough into thin strips for fettuccine.
all.zh: 主廚教我們如何將麵團切成細條，做成寬扁麵。

all.en: We boiled the fresh pasta for just three minutes before tossing it in the sauce.
all.zh: 我們將新鮮義大利麵煮三分鐘，便倒入醬汁中拌勻。

all.en: The taste was completely different from the dried pasta I usually buy at the supermarket.
all.zh: 那滋味與我平常在超市買的乾燥義大利麵截然不同。

all.en: My classmates and I shared our dishes together while drinking sparkling water and chatting.
all.zh: 我和同學們一起分享自己做的料理，邊喝氣泡水邊聊天。

all.en: I left the class feeling proud and inspired to cook more Italian food at home.
all.zh: 下課時，我感到驕傲，也受到啟發，想在家做更多義大利料理。

all.en: The following weekend, I invited my parents over to taste my newly learned pasta skills.
all.zh: 接下來的週末，我邀請父母來品嚐我新學會的義大利麵手藝。

all.en: I spent the whole morning preparing fresh dough and a slow-cooked meat sauce.
all.zh: 我花了一整個早上準備新鮮麵團與慢燉肉醬。

all.en: My mother was impressed that I could roll the pasta so thin without breaking it.
all.zh: 母親很驚訝我能把麵團擀得這麼薄又不會破。

all.en: My father admitted that my homemade pasta tasted better than several restaurants he had visited.
all.zh: 父親承認，我做的自製義大利麵比他去過的好幾家餐廳還美味。

all.en: Encouraged by their praise, I signed up for an advanced course on stuffed pasta like ravioli.
all.zh: 受到他們的稱讚鼓舞，我報名了進階課程，學習做餛飩之類的填餡義大利麵。

all.en: In the next class, we learned how to prepare a delicate filling of cheese and spinach.
all.zh: 在下一堂課中，我們學習如何製作精緻的起司菠菜餡料。

all.en: The chef shared his secret tip of adding a tiny bit of lemon zest to brighten the flavor.
all.zh: 主廚分享他的秘訣：加入一點點檸檬皮，可以提亮風味。

all.en: I started buying special Italian flour online, which made a noticeable difference in texture.
all.zh: 我開始在網路上購買特殊的義大利麵粉，質地有明顯的不同。

all.en: My friends began asking me to host monthly pasta nights at my small apartment kitchen.
all.zh: 朋友們開始要求我每月在我家小公寓的廚房舉辦義大利麵之夜。

all.en: Cooking pasta from scratch slowly became my favorite way to relax after a busy week.
all.zh: 從零開始做義大利麵漸漸成為我忙碌一週後最喜歡的放鬆方式。

all.en: For the holiday season, I prepared a special pasta dinner for ten close friends at my apartment.
all.zh: 佳節期間，我在公寓為十位好友準備了一場特別的義大利麵晚餐。

all.en: I made three different kinds of pasta, including ravioli stuffed with pumpkin and toasted walnuts.
all.zh: 我做了三種不同的義大利麵，包括南瓜核桃餛飩。

all.en: My friends arrived early and helped me roll out the dough on my long kitchen table.
all.zh: 朋友們提早到，並幫我在長型廚房桌上擀開麵團。

all.en: We paired each pasta dish with a different wine that I had carefully chosen beforehand.
all.zh: 我們為每道義大利麵搭配不同的葡萄酒，是我事先精挑細選的。

all.en: My friend Sarah brought freshly baked focaccia that perfectly matched my creamy mushroom sauce.
all.zh: 朋友莎拉帶來剛烤好的佛卡夏麵包，與我的奶油蘑菇醬完美搭配。

all.en: The evening became so lively that we ended up dancing in the kitchen between courses.
all.zh: 夜晚變得熱鬧無比，我們甚至在上菜空檔在廚房裡跳起舞來。

all.en: Inspired by that night, I began offering small private pasta classes on weekend afternoons.
all.zh: 受到那晚啟發，我開始在週末下午開設小型私人義大利麵課程。

all.en: Most of my students were beginners who wanted to impress family with homemade Italian dinners.
all.zh: 我的學生大多是初學者，希望用自製義大利晚餐讓家人驚艷。

all.en: One student even traveled from Tainan just to attend my four-hour Saturday workshop.
all.zh: 有一位學生甚至從台南遠道而來，只為參加我四小時的週六工作坊。

all.en: Teaching others reminded me that good food brings warmth and connection far beyond the kitchen.
all.zh: 教導別人讓我體會到，美食帶來的溫暖與連結遠遠超越廚房本身。

all.en: My weekend pasta classes grew so popular that I had to start a waiting list online.
all.zh: 我的週末義大利麵課程大受歡迎，我不得不在網路上設立候補名單。

all.en: A local food magazine featured me in a four-page article with beautiful color photographs.
all.zh: 一家當地美食雜誌以四頁的篇幅刊登了我的專訪，配上精美彩色照片。

all.en: After the article was published, my Italian chef teacher called to congratulate me warmly.
all.zh: 文章刊出後，我的義大利主廚老師親自來電熱情祝賀我。

all.en: He invited me to visit his hometown in Tuscany during the upcoming harvest season.
all.zh: 他邀請我在即將到來的收成季節，造訪他位於托斯卡尼的家鄉。

all.en: That autumn, I spent two weeks learning regional pasta shapes from his elderly aunt.
all.zh: 那年秋天，我花了兩週時間向他的年長姑姑學習地方性的義大利麵造型。

all.en: His aunt taught me a secret family recipe passed down through five different generations.
all.zh: 他姑姑教我一道流傳五代的家族秘方。

all.en: I returned to Taiwan carrying handwritten notes and a wooden rolling pin from her kitchen.
all.zh: 我帶著手寫筆記與她廚房的木製擀麵棍回到台灣。

all.en: My students were amazed when I demonstrated those traditional shapes they had never seen before.
all.zh: 當我示範那些他們從未見過的傳統造型時，學生們驚嘆不已。

all.en: Sarah suggested I open my own small pasta studio with proper kitchen space for classes.
all.zh: 莎拉建議我開設自己的小型義大利麵工作室，配備適合上課的廚房空間。

all.en: By the following spring, I signed a lease for a bright studio near the local market.
all.zh: 到了隔年春天，我便在當地市場附近簽下一間明亮工作室的租約。

all.en: My new pasta studio opened with a small ribbon-cutting ceremony attended by friends and former students.
all.zh: 我的新義大利麵工作室以一場小型剪綵典禮開幕，朋友與舊學生紛紛到場。

all.en: Sarah designed the colorful logo featuring a rolling pin crossed with a stalk of fresh wheat.
all.zh: 莎拉設計了色彩繽紛的標誌，圖案是擀麵棍與一束新鮮麥穗交疊。

all.en: The studio could host up to twelve students at once with individual workstations and quality tools.
all.zh: 工作室一次可容納十二位學生，配有獨立工作檯與優質工具。

all.en: My Italian chef teacher flew in from Tuscany to teach our very first advanced master class.
all.zh: 我的義大利主廚老師特地從托斯卡尼飛來，教授我們第一堂進階大師課。

all.en: Students traveled from Taipei, Kaohsiung, and even Tokyo just to attend that special weekend workshop.
all.zh: 學生們從台北、高雄甚至東京遠道而來，只為參加那場特別的週末工作坊。

all.en: His elderly aunt sent over handwritten notes and her treasured wooden rolling pin as a gift.
all.zh: 他年長的姑姑寄來手寫筆記與她珍藏的木製擀麵棍作為禮物。

all.en: I displayed those treasured items inside a glass case near the studio's main entrance wall.
all.zh: 我把這些珍貴物品陳列在工作室主入口牆邊的玻璃櫃中。

all.en: A television cooking show invited me to demonstrate regional Tuscan pasta on their popular morning program.
all.zh: 一個電視烹飪節目邀請我在他們熱門的早晨節目中示範托斯卡尼地方性義大利麵。

all.en: Within six months, I hired two assistant teachers to handle the rapidly growing waiting list demand.
all.zh: 短短六個月內，我聘請了兩位助教，以應付快速增長的候補名單需求。

all.en: That little studio truly became a warm community kitchen where strangers became lifelong friends together.
all.zh: 那間小工作室真正成為一個溫暖的社區廚房，讓陌生人結為一生的朋友。
